hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_PROMPT" in *[Mm]igration*|*[Ss]tep\ [0-9]*|*KT-83498*) echo '💡 loadout: AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS + target/50 step N + step Touch files (Sonnet, cavecrew-builder)';; *[Jj]sr*223*|*[Bb]indings*) echo '💡 loadout: AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS + target/40-jsr223-target.md + current/60-jsr223.md (Opus, Plan)';; *K1*|*[Ll]egacy*|*[Rr]emove\ K*) echo '💡 loadout: AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS + current/90-legacy-inventory.md + relevant step from target/50 (Haiku, cavecrew-investigator)';; *[Tt]est*[Tt]riage*|*[Tt]est\ failure*) echo '💡 loadout: AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS Test Commands + current/70-tests.md (Haiku, Explore for failure-text)';; esac

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'kotlin.test.update.test.data=true'; then echo '⛔ BLOCKED: -Pkotlin.test.update.test.data=true is forbidden (Non-Negotiable Rule #9 in AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md).' >&2; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '^\s*\./gradlew' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'tee "\$SCRIPTING_TMP/'; then echo '⛔ BLOCKED: gradle invocation must tee to $SCRIPTING_TMP (Shell Discipline in AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md). Re-run with: ./gradlew :foo:test -q 2>&1 | tee "$SCRIPTING_TMP/foo.txt"' >&2; exit 2; fi
